title: v0.4 roadmap seed catalog (version, workstreams, deliverables, tasks)
body:
Hand-maintained `data/v0.4/` seed JSON: seven workstreams, six deliverables, and task provenance through 2026-06-07. Import via Settings → Import seed JSON into tracker SQLite.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`ee88edf`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/ee88edf)
- **Completed:** 2026-06-07

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4
- **Workstream:** `tracker-implementation`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-tracker-ship`
